sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98396" key="summetapoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμετα-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n98396.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">alter along with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:4:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
